---
title: "Data Cleaning"
subtitle: "An R-driven workflow"
author: "Jacqueline Wu"
date: "2025-11-02"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    embed-resources: true
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

needed <- c("vroom", "dplyr", "stringr", "readr", "fs", "tidyr", "lubridate")
to_install <- setdiff(needed, rownames(installed.packages()))
if (length(to_install)) install.packages(to_install, quiet = TRUE)
invisible(lapply(needed, library, character.only = TRUE))
```
#### import CSVs and select columns
```{r}
path_hoh <- "E:/merge_all/Outputs/clean_Hoh_ALL.csv"
path_cw  <- "E:/merge_all/Outputs/clean_Clearwater_ALL.csv"
path_ew  <- "E:/merge_all/Outputs/Ellsworth/clean_Ellsworth_ALL.csv"

df_hoh <- vroom::vroom(path_hoh, show_col_types = FALSE, progress = FALSE)
df_cw  <- vroom::vroom(path_cw,  show_col_types = FALSE, progress = FALSE)
df_ew  <- vroom::vroom(path_ew,  show_col_types = FALSE, progress = FALSE)

df_hoh <- df_hoh %>% dplyr::select(site = study_site, plot = plot_number, aru = aru_number, date = record_date, hour = record_hour, species = common_name, start_s = `Start (s)`, end_s = `End (s)`)
df_cw  <- df_cw %>% dplyr::select(site = study_site, plot = plot_number, aru = aru_number, date = record_date, hour = record_hour, species = common_name, start_s = `Start (s)`, end_s = `End (s)`)
df_ew  <- df_ew %>% dplyr::select(site = study_site, plot = plot_number, aru = aru_number, date = record_date, hour = record_hour, species = common_name, start_s = `Start (s)`, end_s = `End (s)`)
```
#### 2/3 rule of a minute bin: 0 - 9 mins
```{r}
assign_minute_2over3 <- function(start_s, end_s) {
  # clip to [0, 600]
  s <- max(0, min(start_s, 599.999))
  e <- max(s, min(end_s, 600.000))
  
  # fast path: short segments (<40 s) -> start minute
  if ((e - s) < 40) return(floor(s / 60))

  # general case: choose the minute bin with max overlap (>=40 s)
  m_start <- floor(s / 60)
  m_end   <- floor((max(e - 1e-9, s)) / 60)
  mins <- m_start:m_end

  overlaps <- sapply(mins, function(m) {
    left  <- max(s, m * 60)
    right <- min(e, (m + 1) * 60)
    max(0, right - left)
  })
  # pick the minute with the largest overlap; if ties, earliest
  mins[ which.max(overlaps) ]
}


df_hoh$minute <- mapply(assign_minute_2over3, df_hoh$start_s, df_hoh$end_s)
df_cw$minute  <- mapply(assign_minute_2over3, df_cw$start_s, df_cw$end_s)

df_hoh <- df_hoh %>% dplyr::select(site, plot, aru, date, hour, minute, species)
df_cw  <- df_cw  %>% dplyr::select(site, plot, aru, date, hour, minute, species)

df_ew$minute  <- mapply(assign_minute_2over3, df_ew$start_s, df_ew$end_s)
df_ew <- df_ew %>% dplyr::select(site, plot, aru, date, hour, minute, species)
```
#### calculate detections and form a new table - per-minute tall format table
```{r}
per_min_hoh <- df_hoh %>%
  dplyr::group_by(study_site = site,
                  aru_number = aru,
                  date,
                  hour,
                  minute,
                  species) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(detections = dplyr::n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  dplyr::arrange(study_site, aru_number, date, hour, minute, species)

per_min_cw <- df_cw %>%
  dplyr::group_by(study_site = site,
                  aru_number = aru,
                  date,
                  hour,
                  minute,
                  species) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(detections = dplyr::n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  dplyr::arrange(study_site, aru_number, date, hour, minute, species)

per_min_ew <- df_ew %>%
  dplyr::group_by(study_site = site,
                  aru_number = aru,
                  date,
                  hour,
                  minute,
                  species) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(detections = dplyr::n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  dplyr::arrange(study_site, aru_number, date, hour, minute, species)
```
#### calculate detections and form a new table - per-minute tall format table
```{r}
per_min_hoh <- df_hoh %>%
  dplyr::group_by(study_site = site,
                  aru_number = aru,
                  date,
                  hour,
                  minute,
                  species) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(detections = dplyr::n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  dplyr::arrange(study_site, aru_number, date, hour, minute, species)

per_min_cw <- df_cw %>%
  dplyr::group_by(study_site = site,
                  aru_number = aru,
                  date,
                  hour,
                  minute,
                  species) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(detections = dplyr::n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  dplyr::arrange(study_site, aru_number, date, hour, minute, species)

per_min_ew <- df_ew %>%
  dplyr::group_by(study_site = site,
                  aru_number = aru,
                  date,
                  hour,
                  minute,
                  species) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(detections = dplyr::n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  dplyr::arrange(study_site, aru_number, date, hour, minute, species)
```
#### generate Species × ARU pivot 
```{r}
pivot_hoh <- per_min_hoh %>%
  dplyr::group_by(species, aru_number) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(total_detections = sum(detections), .groups = "drop") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from  = aru_number,
    values_from = total_detections,
    values_fill = 0
  )

pivot_cw <- per_min_cw %>%
  dplyr::group_by(species, aru_number) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(total_detections = sum(detections), .groups = "drop") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from  = aru_number,
    values_from = total_detections,
    values_fill = 0
  )

pivot_ew <- per_min_ew %>%
  dplyr::group_by(species, aru_number) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(total_detections = sum(detections), .groups = "drop") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from  = aru_number,
    values_from = total_detections,
    values_fill = 0
  )

aru_order_hoh <- sort(unique(per_min_hoh$aru_number))
pivot_hoh <- pivot_hoh %>%
  dplyr::mutate(TOTAL = rowSums(dplyr::across(tidyselect::any_of(as.character(aru_order_hoh))))) %>%
  dplyr::select(species, tidyselect::any_of(as.character(aru_order_hoh)), TOTAL) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(desc(TOTAL), species)

aru_order_cw <- sort(unique(per_min_cw$aru_number))
pivot_cw <- pivot_cw %>%
  dplyr::mutate(TOTAL = rowSums(dplyr::across(tidyselect::any_of(as.character(aru_order_cw))))) %>%
  dplyr::select(species, tidyselect::any_of(as.character(aru_order_cw)), TOTAL) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(desc(TOTAL), species)

aru_order_ew <- sort(unique(per_min_ew$aru_number))
pivot_ew <- pivot_ew %>%
  dplyr::mutate(TOTAL = rowSums(dplyr::across(tidyselect::any_of(as.character(aru_order_ew))))) %>%
  dplyr::select(species, tidyselect::any_of(as.character(aru_order_ew)), TOTAL) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(desc(TOTAL), species)
```
#### save new CSVs
```{r}
stamp <- format(Sys.Date(), "%Y%m%d")
outroot <- "E:/outputs"
dir.create(file.path(outroot, "Ellsworth"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(file.path(outroot, "Hoh"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(file.path(outroot, "Clearwater"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

readr::write_csv(df_hoh, file.path(outroot, "Hoh", paste0("Hoh_min_no_detections", stamp, ".csv")))
readr::write_csv(per_min_hoh, file.path(outroot, "Hoh", paste0("Hoh_detections_per_minute_", stamp, ".csv")))
readr::write_csv(pivot_hoh,   file.path(outroot, "Hoh", paste0("Hoh_species_by_ARU_pivot_", stamp, ".csv")))

readr::write_csv(df_cw, file.path(outroot, "Clearwater", paste0("Clearwater_min_no_detections", stamp, ".csv")))
readr::write_csv(per_min_cw, file.path(outroot, "Clearwater", paste0("Clearwater_detections_per_minute_", stamp, ".csv")))
readr::write_csv(pivot_cw, file.path(outroot, "Clearwater", paste0("Clearwater_species_by_ARU_pivot_", stamp, ".csv")))

readr::write_csv(df_ew, file.path(outroot, "Ellsworth", paste0("Ellsworth_min_no_detections", stamp, ".csv")))
readr::write_csv(per_min_ew, file.path(outroot, "Ellsworth", paste0("Ellsworth_detections_per_minute_", stamp, ".csv")))
readr::write_csv(pivot_ew,   file.path(outroot, "Ellsworth", paste0("Ellsworth_species_by_ARU_pivot_", stamp, ".csv")))
```
